benefits.description: Plans to use PNC-27 to kill off cancer cells between HGH runs as a precautionary measure

protocol_notes: User is 36 years old, currently running HGH and 'other shit'. Plans to run PNC-27 in approximately 6 months when current cycle ends, prior to next HGH run, as a preventative anti-cancer measure. Advocates for HGH over CJC as it is now similarly priced and considers it a smarter choice over 40, and even at 36.
